mapper.sql: id , banner_1 , company_shows_text_img_url , company_shows_title_img_url , company_shows_img_url , company_shows_advantage_img_url , support_img_url
mapper.update:
update mlsd_item_advantage
id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
banner_1 = #{record.banner1,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
company_shows_text_img_url = #{record.companyShowsTextImgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
company_shows_title_img_url = #{record.companyShowsTitleImgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
company_shows_img_url = #{record.companyShowsImgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
company_shows_advantage_img_url = #{record.companyShowsAdvantageImgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
support_img_url = #{record.supportImgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

update mlsd_item_advantage
id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
banner_1 = #{banner1,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
company_shows_text_img_url = #{companyShowsTextImgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
company_shows_title_img_url = #{companyShowsTitleImgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
company_shows_img_url = #{companyShowsImgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
company_shows_advantage_img_url = #{companyShowsAdvantageImgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
support_img_url = #{supportImgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: select id , banner_1 , company_shows_text_img_url , company_shows_title_img_url , company_shows_img_url , company_shows_advantage_img_url , support_img_url from mlsd_item_advantage where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

select id , banner_1 , company_shows_text_img_url , company_shows_title_img_url , company_shows_img_url , company_shows_advantage_img_url , support_img_url from mlsd_item_advantage where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
